title: Verify Your Email
subtitle: We'll send a verification link to your email address to confirm your account

messages.verificationSent: A verification link has been sent to your email address. Please check your inbox and spam folder.
messages.validationFailed: Please correct the errors below and try again.
messages.cooldownActive: Please wait before requesting another verification email.
messages.pendingVerificationRequired: Your account is still pending email verification. Request a fresh verification email and complete the link in your inbox before signing in.
messages.verificationRecovery: That verification link could not be completed. Request a new verification email to continue.
messages.duplicatePendingAccount: This email already has a pending account. Request another verification email to continue.
messages.emailUpdatedSuccess: Email address has been updated successfully.

errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
errors.validationFailed: Check your information and try again.

help.checkInbox: Check your inbox and spam folder for the verification email.
help.clickLink: Click the link in the email to verify your account.
help.resendInfo: Didn't receive the email? You can request a new one after {seconds} seconds.
help.contactSupport: Still having issues? Contact our support team for assistance.
